allow: PowerShell(npx vercel env ls production 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell($try=0; do { Start-Sleep 3; $try++; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://paeoniam.vercel.app/diag" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $code = $r.StatusCode } catch { $code = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ } } while \($code -ne 200 -and $try -lt 20\); Write-Host "diag page status: $code \(after $try tries\)")

PowerShell($try=0; do { Start-Sleep 3; $try++; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://paeoniam.vercel.app/diag" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $body=$r.Content } catch { $body="" } } while \($body -notmatch "2b" -and $try -lt 20\); Write-Host "diag updated \(TEST 2b present\): $\($body -match '2b'\) after $try tries")

PowerShell($try=0; do { Start-Sleep 4; $try++; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "https://paeoniam.vercel.app/chat" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $ok=$r.StatusCode -eq 200 } catch { $ok=$false } } while \(-not $ok -and $try -lt 15\); Write-Host "chat page live: $ok \(after $try tries\)")

PowerShell($try=0; do { Start-Sleep 4; $try++; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "https://paeoniam.vercel.app/chat" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $ok=$r.StatusCode -eq 200 } catch { $ok=$false } } while \(-not $ok -and $try -lt 15\); Write-Host "deploy live: $ok")

PowerShell($try=0; do { Start-Sleep 4; $try++; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "https://paeoniam.vercel.app/memories" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $ok=$r.StatusCode -eq 200 } catch { $ok=$false } } while \(-not $ok -and $try -lt 15\); Write-Host "memories page live: $ok")
